# DownTown Brussels | Belgian Beers & Sports Bar

> The Temple of Belgian Beers & Sports Events in the heart of Brussels.

DownTown Brussels is a vibrant sports bar and brasserie located just steps away from Place de la Bourse and the iconic Grand Place. We are the go-to destination for true beer lovers and sports fans.

## 📍 Location & Contact
- **Address:** Rue Henri Maus 15, 1000 Brussels (Place de la Bourse)
- **Phone:** +32 493 37 77 77
- **Email:** downtownbrussels@gmail.com
- **Opening Hours:** Monday – Sunday (7/7) | 12:00 — 01:00

## 🍺 What We Offer
- **Belgian Beers:** 25+ authentic Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, Lambics, and Witbiers on tap and in bottles.
- **Live Sports:** 20+ live screens broadcasting major sports events all year round (Football, Champions League, Belgian Pro League, Tennis, Rugby).
- **Extensive Drink Menu:** Creative cocktails, top-quality spirits, shots, softs, ciders, wines, and champagnes.

## 🕒 Happy Hour
Every day from 14:00 to 22:00!
- Bottled beers: 3 for €12
- Spritz & aperitifs: 2 for €12
- Classic cocktails and mocktails: Buy 1 Get 1 FREE

## 🔗 Quick Links
- [Menu](/menu)
- [Live Events](/events)
- [Reservations](/contact)
- [Private Events](/contact)
- [FAQ](/faq)

*Booking is highly recommended, especially in the evening and on match days! DownTown is also the perfect strategic meeting point for your bar crawl in Brussels.*
